20:<manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
25:        android:name="android.hardware.touchscreen"
29:        android:name="android.hardware.type.pc"
39:    <application
40:        android:name=".android.NotepadApplication"
48:        <activity-alias
49:            android:name="com.farmerbb.notepad.MainActivity"
53:            <intent-filter>
54:                <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" />
56:                <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" />
57:                <category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT" />
58:                <category android:name="android.intent.category.APP_MAPS" />
59:            </intent-filter>
60:            <meta-data android:name="android.app.shortcuts"
63:        <activity-alias
64:            android:name="com.farmerbb.notepad.activity.NoteEditActivity"
69:            <intent-filter>
70:                <action android:name="android.intent.action.VIEW" />
71:                <action android:name="android.intent.action.EDIT" />
72:                <action android:name="android.intent.action.SEND" />
73:                <action android:name="com.google.android.gm.action.AUTO_SEND" />
75:                <category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT" />
76:                <category android:name="com.google.android.voicesearch.SELF_NOTE" />

79:            </intent-filter>
